prestazioni: Engine swap to a Chrysler RB 440 Magnum (440ci, 7.2L V8) with a forged crankshaft (Eagle 4340 steel crank, 4.320" stroke), forged connecting rods (Eagle H-beam, 6.760" length), and forged pistons (JE 2618 alloy, 12.5:1 compression ratio) for a 550+ HP naturally aspirated build. Pair with a Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 294° hydraulic roller camshaft (0.568" lift, 248° duration @ 0.050") and ported Edelbrock Performer RPM cylinder heads (2.14" intake, 1.81" exhaust valves).

Fuel system upgrade with a Holley Dominator EFI system (2,000 CFM throttle body) and dual Holley HP in-tank fuel pumps (340 LPH each) feeding 1000cc Bosch EV14 injectors. Ignition handled by an MSD Digital 7 Plus CDI box with a Blaster SS coil and Taylor 8.8mm ThunderVolt wires.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission (2.87:1 1st gear) paired to a McLeod twin-disc clutch (RST 10.5" diaphragm) and a Ford 9" rear end with a Detroit Truetrac limited-slip differential (3.91:1 gear ratio). Suspension overhaul with Hotchkis TVS Stage 3 coilovers (adjustable damping) and a Global West subframe connectors kit to reduce chassis flex.
estetica: Custom 3-piece steel wheels by Wheel Vintiques (17x8 front, 17x9 rear) wrapped in BFGoodrich g-Force Rival S 2 tires (245/45R17 front, 275/40R17 rear). Fender flares from a Restomod Air Street Rods kit (2" wider than stock) to accommodate the staggered setup.

Body modifications include a custom front splitter by Anderson Composites (carbon fiber, 3" overhang) and a dual-plane rear wing from DSE (aluminum construction, adjustable angle). Full de-chrome with a 3-stage PPG Hot Rod Black paint job and hand-brushed satin clear coat for a stealth matte finish.

Interior overhaul with Recaro SRD front seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) upholstered in Alcantara with red stitching, paired to a custom roll cage by Chassisworks (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in). Gauges replaced with a Dakota Digital HDX series cluster (full digital readouts) and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (3" deep dish, suede grip).
